papers.title: Collagen peptide supplementation reduces functional joint pain in knee and hip: a randomized controlled trial
papers.summary: 154名受試者每日服用5克持續12周，膝、髖關節功能性疼痛顯著減少 [cite: 18]。

papers.title: Specific Collagen Peptides Improve Endurance Performance and Lean Body Mass in Trained Women
papers.summary: 每日服用15克持續12周，顯著增加60分鐘跑步測試距離（+331m），並提升有氧代謝能力 [cite: 90]。

papers.title: Improvement of Functional Ankle Instability Following Supplementation with Specific Collagen Peptides
papers.summary: 50名慢性踝關節不穩受試者，每日服用5克持續6個月，顯著增強關節穩定性並減少扭傷次數 [cite: 74]。

papers.title: The Effectiveness of Specific Collagen Peptides on Osteoarthritis in Dogs
papers.summary: 體外與臨床研究顯示能刺激犬類軟骨基質合成，減少發炎因子，顯著改善跛行與活動能力 [cite: 113]。
